jd_analysis_result.summary: The Personal Care Assistant at Opal HealthCare is responsible for assisting residents with personal care needs and activities of daily living while ensuring accurate documentation in care planning. The role involves working under the direction of Registered Nurses and Senior Management.

skill_evidence.aged care: Certificate III in Individual Support/Aged Care or equivalent required
skill_evidence.care planning: Ensuring accurate and concise documentation in Care Planning
skill_evidence.personal care: Assisting residents with Personal Care needs
skill_evidence.activities of daily living: Assisting residents with Activities of Daily Living

Working under the direction of Registered Nurses and Senior Management
